EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, SAXON , AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT WOO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. $2,425 OF WOO'S MONEY IS EXEMPT UNDER CCP 704.080(B)(2). WOO FAILS TO CITE A BASIS TO EXEMPT THE EXCESS OF $717.35. WOO APPEARS TO ARGUE THAT THE EXCESS IS NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT. WOO FAILS TO CITE A STATUTORY BASIS TO EXEMPT THE EXCESS AND FAILS TO MEET HIS BURDEN UNDER CCP 704.080(E)(4). IF WOO IS RELYING ON THE NECESSARY FOR SUPPORT EXEMPTION OF CCP 706.051(B), THAT EXEMPTION DOES NOT APPLY AS THIS CASE DOES NOT INVOLVE AN EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MILES LENDWAY, CSR#13684 EMAIL: MLENDWAY@SFTC.ORG =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Woo's claim of exemption is DENIED. $2,425 of Woo's money is exempt under CCP 704.080(b)(2). Woo fails to cite a basis to exempt the excess of $717.35. Woo appears to argue that the excess is necessary for his support. Woo fails to cite a statutory basis to exempt the excess and fails to meet his burden under CCP 704.080(e)(4). If Woo is relying on the necessary for support exemption of CCP 706.051(b), that exemption does not apply as this case does not involve an earnings withholding order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684 email: mlendway@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
